description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on push to master and on pull requests to master. The workflow has multiple jobs: pylama, mypy, docs, tests, and finish. The pylama, mypy, and docs jobs run on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.10, install dependencies with poetry, and run pylama, mypy, or pytest respectively. The tests job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions from 3.7 to 3.11, installs dependencies with poetry, and runs pytest with coverage. The finish job waits for tests to complete and then notifies Coveralls.
